events.title: AI in the Built Environment: Practical Applications for Architects & Design
events.description: An AIA CEU will dive into how AI is transforming architecture, design, smart buildings, and connected environments. Attendees will gain insights into the cutting-edge technologies reshaping the built environment from professionals working at the intersection of AI and design.

events.title: Matcha Mahjong Mixer
events.description: Founders and investors building in AI, SaaS, fintech, and beyond will gather for an unconventional mixer where mahjong and matcha replace the typical pitch-deck format, designed to surface genuine connections among people who've actually shipped products. Organized by Leo AI (2025 Startup Awards finalist) and Reitler Kailas & Rosenblatt (a boutique venture law firm), the evening promises high-value conversations in an intimate setting without the name-tag grind.

events.title: Women in Tech, Fintech, AI, Startups, Networking Event & Elevator Pitch
events.description: Female tech professionals, fintech enthusiasts, AI innovators, and startup founders will gather to exchange insights across Women in Tech, Fintech, HealthTech, and AI—complete with elevator pitches, knowledge-sharing sessions, and direct access to investors and business consultants. Expect candid conversations about industry challenges and opportunities alongside meaningful connections with experienced entrepreneurs and academics driving innovation across emerging tech sectors.

events.title: The Buyer Changed. Your Checkout Didn't
events.description: DTC operators are gathering for breakfast to cut through the hype and dig into what's actually shifting in checkout—from traditional clicks to machine-driven buying—with founders and execs from AS Beauty, The Perfect Jean, and the team behind PrettyDamnQuick breaking down real data, cross-brand benchmarks, and the hard questions most brands aren't asking yet.

events.title: AI Specialists: AppliedAI Horizons - Ethics, Growth & Connections
events.description: Applied AI specialists will gather to network and explore the latest developments in artificial intelligence applications across industries.

events.title: AI Builders Night
events.description: Engineers, data practitioners, and founders will dive into real-world AI applications and the infrastructure behind large-scale systems, with talks from industry leaders like PromptQL's Director of Engineering and Converge's Co-Founder & CTO. The evening will feature deep dives on observability and AI deployment, plus plenty of time to network with others building the future of AI.

events.title: The Future of Biosecurity with SPC
events.description: Tech leaders and biodefense experts will tackle how software and AI are revolutionizing biosecurity—from detecting outbreaks today to preventing engineered threats tomorrow—featuring speakers like Palantir's Spencer Weiss, Phare Bio's Dr. Akhila Kosaraju (who's secured $27M from ARPA-H for AI-driven antibiotic discovery), and veteran biotech investor Charlie Petty. Expect real talk on scaling solutions that could fundamentally reshape pandemic preparedness and public health infrastructure.

events.title: Vibe Coding for Designers Meetup
events.description: Designers will gather to work on personal projects—especially those AI ideas that have been sitting on the back burner—while getting real feedback from fellow product, UX/UI, and visual designers in a collaborative workspace.

events.title: How DTC Brands Are Using AI to Make More Profit | DTC Builders NYC
events.description: DTC founders and ecommerce operators will dive into how AI is actually moving the needle on profitability—from spotting profit leaks to automating marketing and operations decisions—with real case studies from brands doing it right now. You'll network with agency owners, tech builders, and fellow founders who are actively implementing these strategies, not just theorizing about them.

events.title: AI & Tech Networking Event in by Ascent Valley
events.description: Founders, investors, and AI experts will converge for a curated networking event where ambitious builders pitch ideas, exchange feedback, and forge partnerships in a dynamic startup ecosystem. Selected founders get stage time for focused pitches and professional evaluation from active VCs and angel investors, with the standout startup earning featured visibility across the platform's global network.

events.title: Fireside Chat: Can We Patent AI?
events.description: Rocket Breakfasts is bringing together founders, investors, and attorneys from Lowenstein Sandler—a 400+ attorney firm specializing in startups and tech—for a fireside chat on patenting AI and protecting innovation when over 80% of founder value now comes from intangible assets. Expect sharp insights on IP strategy in the age of generative AI, quality breakfast, and a room full of people actually thinking about the future of tech.

events.title: Operators Club: World Cup Edition
events.description: Tech and ops folks will gather to catch a World Cup quarterfinal while swapping real talk about AI implementation, governance headaches, and enterprise complexity—no formal presentations, just peers decompressing over drinks and bites.

events.title: Building Web-Powered AI Apps Without Code: Base44 & Tavily
events.description: Hands-on workshop where you'll build functional web apps using AI without coding—learn to turn text prompts into real tools with Base44 and Tavily's web research capabilities, then deploy your own working application in just two hours. Perfect for product managers, marketers, and anyone curious about practical AI, no technical background needed.

events.title: AI Meetup (July) with Google and JPMorgan
events.description: AI enthusiasts will gather to explore cutting-edge developments in artificial intelligence and network with fellow tech professionals. The meetup will feature discussions on practical AI applications and emerging trends in the field.

events.title: Demo Event: Build Your Own System
events.description: You'll witness a hands-on breakdown of connecting VS Code, GitHub, and AI coding assistants into one smooth workflow—showing how the technical barriers to building and shipping software have basically disappeared.

events.title: Build Lab: From Idea to Deployed App in 90 Minutes with Claude Code
events.description: A fast-paced workshop will walk participants through building and deploying a full application using Claude Code, compressing what typically takes hours into a single 90-minute session. Attendees will experience the entire development cycle from concept to live deployment, showcasing how modern AI tools can dramatically accelerate the app creation process.

events.title: AI Users - AI Enthusiasts Happy Hour with Featured Guest
events.description: Leading AI researchers and technologists will dive into how ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and other cutting-edge models are reshaping industries and workflows. Expect hands-on insights from folks actually building and deploying these systems at scale.

events.title: The AI Briefing by Startup Grind - The C-Suite Gap in AI Readiness
events.description: AI leaders and founders will dive into bridging the leadership gap in AI-driven companies, with insights from industry veterans navigating the rapid evolution of artificial intelligence.

events.title: Hands-on Workshop: Build AI Customer Agents that Remember and Resolve Issues
events.description: You'll walk through redesigning one of your real customer workflows for AI—mapping conversations, deciding what stays human vs. automated, and leaving with a concrete 30-day pilot plan across chat, voice, WhatsApp, and CRM that actually works without the hype.

events.title: AI Specialists: AIConnect – Chart Your AI Career & Collaborate Globally
events.description: AI specialists and tech professionals will gather to network and exchange ideas about the latest developments in artificial intelligence and machine learning.

events.title: New York Tech Mixer and Social (Tech / AI / Data / IT)
events.description: Tech enthusiasts at all levels will gather for an afterwork meetup to connect and build community together.

events.title: [OOi x Shopify] Building Brands People Want to Belong
events.description: Industry veterans—including an Apple designer, a Cash App marketing leader, and founders with 15+ years in brand building—will dig into how modern brands create communities people genuinely want to belong to through storytelling, cultural relevance, and emotional connection. Expect practical insights on what actually makes brands stick, not generic marketing playbook stuff.

events.title: AI Operator Run Club
events.description: A tight-knit group of AI founders, engineers, and operators will tackle a conversational 5K run along the Hudson River before connecting over coffee and pastries, creating the perfect low-pressure setting to meet peers tackling similar challenges in the booming AI space.

events.title: AI Healthcare Hack - by Arya Health & Twilio AI Startup Searchlight
events.description: Healthcare Hack NYC will bring builders together for a one-day sprint to ship production-ready voice AI agents that actually work in healthcare, hosted by Arya Health (a Series A startup) and powered by Twilio's AI Startup Searchlight program. You'll have five hours to build a conversational AI agent with real guardrails and domain knowledge, compete for Twilio credits and engineering interviews with Arya Health, and network with the NYC startup ecosystem.

events.title: Build Different: AI, Community & the Future
events.description: The A.I. x Library Project, backed by Chime, will explore how AI is reshaping communities and the future workplace, featuring insights from leaders in technology and innovation.

events.title: Founder-Led Growth: The Content System That Brings Customers
events.description: Discover how to transform founder-led content from a vanity metric into a revenue-driving customer acquisition system, with practical frameworks and tactics that cut through the noise and actually work. Juné will dig deeper into the content strategies that earned rave reviews at New York Tech Week, offering sharper examples and clearer paths to building sustainable growth without the guesswork.

events.title: Creationship Sundays: AI for Creative Good
events.description: Creative builders and thinkers will gather on Sunday evenings to ideate and prototype solutions for social good, bringing together diverse minds—from founders to prompt engineers to artists—who'll collaborate using AI tools and collective imagination to build the next generation of projects the world needs. Over four hours of brainstorming, building, and community connection, teams will form organically around half-baked ideas that spark interest, resulting in real prototypes and lasting creative partnerships.

events.title: AI Ready Startup Accelerator
events.description: Founders will dive into a virtual intensive focused on equipping entrepreneurs with the strategies to build, launch, and drive sales in the rapidly evolving AI economy. This hands-on program will cover the essential playbook for navigating AI-powered business development from concept to revenue generation.

events.title: Harnessing AI for Science Educators (ALL LEVELS)
events.description: K-12 science educators will explore how to leverage and create AI tools to streamline classroom instruction and administrative workflows. Teachers will gain practical strategies for integrating AI into their practice to enhance student learning and reduce workload burdens.

events.title: Entre Amigas: Tu Negocio, Impulsado por IA
events.description: Women entrepreneurs will dive into practical AI tools and strategies through real conversations with fellow founders who get it.

events.title: Gen Z Founder & Creator Mixer
events.description: GenZtea's February mixer will bring together Gen Z founders, creators, and investors from across the globe—featuring builders from Meta, Morgan Stanley, and leading startups working in AI, fintech, and beyond—for an evening of networking, snacks, and real connections with people actually building something.

events.title: Demo Night: Internal Design Tools
events.description: Designers from Ramp, Anthropic, Profound, and Clay will share lightning talks about the internal design tools that actually shape how their teams work, with plenty of time to eat and network with fellow designers building behind-the-scenes solutions.

events.title: Build with AI Meetup
events.description: Mid to senior-level women in tech will dig into what's thrilling and terrifying about building with AI, from early experiments to full-fledged projects, creating space for real talk about the opportunities and challenges ahead.

events.title: Founders & Operators: Rooftop Drinks
events.description: Early-stage founders and operators will gather for unstructured rooftop conversation hosted by Stephan Rihs (ex-Coinbase & BCG, founder at Veynor), bringing together folks from YC, a16z, Samsung Ventures, and leading AI/B2B SaaS companies for peer-to-peer networking over drinks with zero pitches or panels.

events.title: AI Specialists: AgenticAI Global Innovation Mixer
events.description: Specialists at agenticai will gather to network and exchange insights on the latest developments in AI agents and emerging technologies. Industry leaders and practitioners will be there to discuss trends, opportunities, and real-world applications shaping the future of the field.

events.title: AI Technology Summit
events.description: Tech leaders, developers, and real estate pros will converge to explore how AI and digital twins are reshaping building decarbonization, from emissions forecasting to real-time operations optimization. Expect cutting-edge demos, insights from seasoned operators like Igor Starkov (30+ years in software and BIM), and practical takeaways on turning AI into actual compliance and retrofit strategies.

events.title: Founder Dinner
events.description: Series A/B founders scaling past $2M ARR will swap candid advice on fundraising and growth strategy over a four-course dinner with sommelier pairings and live music, hosted by Borderless alongside AI revenue platform Tabs and startup-focused accounting firm Kruze Consulting.

events.title: Claude Code and CoWork on AWS
events.description: Enterprise teams will explore deployment patterns for Claude Code and Claude CoWork through Amazon Bedrock, leveraging existing identity infrastructure for seamless integration.

events.title: Health2Tech NYC, July 16 2026
events.description: Digital health founders, healthcare pros, and investors will gather on July 16th for a panel on AI avatars in healthcare and extensive networking, hosted by seasoned healthtech leaders including a former speech-language pathologist who's raised over $10M in capital, a digital health expert and medical device co-founder, and a healthcare strategist advising on tech and business growth. Expect real conversations with innovators actively shaping the health tech landscape, potential collaborators, mentors, and thought leaders driving the next wave of healthcare innovation.

events.title: Inertia's (first) Launch Party
events.description: Get hands-on with Inertia, an AI-powered financial planning platform that transforms financial intentions into real action, while shaping its future through early testing and direct feedback alongside fellow early adopters. This intimate gathering will feature interactive sessions, networking, and behind-the-scenes insights into how a fintech startup develops innovative solutions for personal finance.

events.title: AI Collective: Summer Meetup
events.description: Creators, professionals, and innovators will explore hands-on AI demos and connect over real-world applications of the technology. The gathering promises networking opportunities and practical insights into how AI is shaping creative and professional work.

events.title: Ayse Polat: Building Beyond Completion-Leverage Design & Construction Data
events.description: Ayse Polat will break down how design and construction data transforms into operational gold for smart buildings, digital twins, and AI-driven decision-making throughout a building's lifecycle. Discover practical strategies for turning project information into long-term value while exploring how connected systems and predictive analytics enhance building performance and occupant experiences.

events.title: AI Startup & Investor Networking
events.description: AI and tech founders, investors, and industry professionals will gather to connect and exchange ideas in a focused setting designed for serious business conversations.

events.title: Tech Founders, Investors & Pitch Night
events.description: AI and tech founders, investors, and industry professionals will gather in a dedicated space to connect and explore opportunities together.

events.title: Builders, Founders, and Creatives Meetup
events.description: A laid-back evening will bring together founders, operators, creatives, investors, and builders across tech, AI, and creative fields for drinks and unfiltered conversation with thoughtful, ambitious people making things happen in the city.

events.title: Fonzi's Poker & Game Night
events.description: AI founders, engineers, and VCs will gather for a night of high-stakes poker and casual gaming, with four tables running alongside board games and video games, all fueled by complimentary drinks and pizza. It's a low-pressure chance to play cards and meet some of NYC's top builders in the AI space.

events.title: Dev Cup: Tavily x Composio
events.description: Developers from Tavily and Composio will kick it on the pitch for an evening of pickup soccer and real talk about AI agents handling the work that keeps devs chained to their desks. Expect fellow builders who genuinely understand the future of automation where humans actually get to clock out.

events.title: Builders Cup 2026 - A Hackathon by Ramp
events.description: Builders Cup is a one-day hackathon where developers will compete across four prize tracks—from audience favorite to best game to solutions that save time and money—with mentorship from Cursor and Codex, live workshops, and a chance to impress some of the fastest-growing tech companies. Solo hackers and teams of up to four will ship real projects, demo their work, and take home prizes plus serious bragging rights.

events.title: AI Startup Networking Rooftop Happy Hour
events.description: AI startup founders and builders will connect over drinks with a rooftop skyline backdrop, turning casual networking into genuine relationship-building moments. Expect conversations with fellow entrepreneurs pushing the boundaries of AI innovation.

events.title: Build the AI Future : LinuxONE & IBM BOB Hands‑On
events.description: Attendees will dive into hands-on demos showcasing how LinuxONE and zSystems drive enterprise AI and secure infrastructure at this full-day technical meetup led by industry experts.

events.title: Rooftop QA | Engineering Cocktail Hour
events.description: QA and engineering leaders will gather for candid conversations about balancing rapid feature development with quality in the AI era, covering everything from testing workflows to automation's real limits. Expect a relaxed rooftop setting where peers actively shipping software can swap war stories and trade ideas on what actually works.

events.title: AI Founders Supper Club (Hosted by The AI Furnace)
events.description: Early-stage AI founders will gather monthly for an intimate 3-course dinner hosted by The AI Furnace, a global community of 20,000+ AI entrepreneurs, to swap war stories and build genuine connections with peers tackling similar challenges. The curated NYC gatherings from Angela Mascarenas and Hamza Zaveri will bring together 15-20 high-caliber founders in a referral-based network focused on real conversations rather than pitching.

events.title: My Worst Day as a CFO: Lessons That Changed How I Lead
events.description: CFOs will share their biggest professional missteps and the hard-won lessons that turned those moments into growth opportunities, revealing how to spot financial risks earlier and evolve from reactive problem-solver to true strategic partner. A panel of seasoned finance leaders will dig into real scenarios followed by Q&A, giving you actionable insights to strengthen stakeholder relationships and prevent costly decisions.

events.title: Meet us on the Roof! Brits in Tech & The Great British Business Club
events.description: Brits in Tech and the Great British Business Club will host a rooftop summer happy hour with representatives from the UK's Department for Business and Trade, real estate and immigration tech leaders, bringing together British founders, operators, engineers, and investors for drinks and networking across NYC's business scene.

events.title: Conversations About AI: Tools and Strategies for Entrepreneurs
events.description: NYPL will host an insightful panel discussion on AI featuring experts from Women TechExchange, promising a deep dive into the latest developments in artificial intelligence.
events.venue: Schomburg Center for Research in Black Culture - New York Public Library

events.title: Other Intelligence
events.description: Other Intelligence will bring together researchers, artists, designers, and technologists to explore how understanding animal communication, plant intelligence, and ecological sensing can reshape the way we build technology and approach conservation. The midsummer summit will dig into bioacoustics, biomaterials, nonhuman-centered design, rights of nature, and world modeling—asking how we can move beyond AI-centric thinking to engage with the many forms of intelligence that already surround us.

events.title: AI-Native Women: Beauty, Health, Wellness
events.description: Beauty marketers and founders will get hands-on with AI tools alongside leaders who've already built working solutions—think Tarte's Claude marketing assistant and Beekman 1802's creator-sourcing agent—while walking away with an actual AI brand assistant you'll build in the room. You'll get practical fluency from execs at Estée Lauder and other CPG giants, plus real talk from founders who built AI beauty tools with zero technical background.

events.title: Women Who Build: Creating Your Portfolio with AI
events.description: Aparna and Carley are hosting a hands-on meetup for women building AI projects, featuring a build session where you'll create your own portfolio site using Claude Code—no experience necessary, just bring your laptop and curiosity. You'll leave with new Claude Code skills, a portfolio draft, and a crew of women figuring out AI development together.

events.title: AI Tech Startup & Investor Networking
events.description: AI and tech founders, investors, and industry pros will gather to network and exchange ideas in a focused, curated setting.

events.description: Numeric customers will gather for lunch at the NYC office to swap MCP use cases, discuss AI adoption strategies, and connect with peers tackling similar challenges.

events.description: A hack night will bring together builders for food, networking, and hands-on coding sessions—whether you're coming with a side project, a fresh idea, or just your laptop ready to experiment.

events.title: Mind Games: Understanding AI Through Play
events.description: Leading data scientists and AI practitioners will break down the latest techniques in machine learning, deep learning, and AI applications to help you level up your skillset. You'll get hands-on exposure to cutting-edge tools and real-world case studies that'll transform how you approach AI problems.

events.title: Fonzi's July Devs & Drinks
events.description: You'll hang with NYC's best AI and product engineers over drinks and games like pool, ping-pong, and arcade—no boring talks, just people actually building things connecting and having a good time.

events.title: AI Engineers: Devs & Drinks
events.description: A monthly gathering will bring together NYC engineers actively shipping projects, creating an organic community of builders without the usual networking event formality.

events.title: AWS AI Builder Lab - Clash of Agents Competition
events.description: Top AI researchers and engineers will showcase cutting-edge machine learning projects while competitors battle it out for prizes in this hands-on hackathon-style competition.

events.title: Coffee Club | Taking the Leap: Industry Vets Who Left to Build

This July meetup brings together pre-Series A founders who've made the leap from established careers in finance, healthcare, tech, and beyond.

NYC B2B, which has hosted thousands of startup founders and operators across verticals like Vertical SaaS, FinTech, and DevTools, will facilitate connections between builders actively shaping the future of enterprise AI.

events.description: AI developers and enthusiasts will gather to network and explore cutting-edge agentic AI tools from OpenRAG, IBM, and other innovators, with tech showcases, light refreshments, and drinks afterward.

events.description: NYC's AI Engineers Tech Talk will bring together machine learning engineers, fullstack devs, and technical founders for deep dives into real-world AI projects—expect three lightning talks from practitioners sharing what they've built and how they solved gnarly technical challenges.

events.description: Senior finance and technology executives will dig into the CFO AI Leverage Report—a new industry benchmark revealing how enterprises are actually funding and measuring AI investments, with findings showing generative AI spending hitting $37 billion in 2025 and CFOs taking the lead on AI governance and capital allocation. Attendees will benchmark their strategies against peers while exploring the financial metrics and ROI frameworks that determine which AI initiatives get greenlit.

events.description: You'll get hands-on experience turning ideas into deployed apps in just 90 minutes using Claude Code, guided by developers who know how to move fast from concept to production.

events.description: Olivia from Forum Ventures will be bringing her team together for an August coffee meetup with AI-native founders rethinking what's possible—whether you're fresh to tech or pivoting from traditional approaches, this is your chance to connect with a fund that's backing 65+ companies and building 8 more through their venture studio. events.description: Senior finance and banking leaders will convene with cutting-edge AI/ML researchers to explore the latest advances in predictive analytics and intelligent automation across the financial services industry.
